'''Mika Kaebra''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] communications officer who worked for the [[Committee of Seven for Garosian Unification|Garos Resistance]] movement, specializing in the monitoring of [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] communications frequencies.

==Appearances==
*{{JournalCite|2|Whispers in the Dark|reprint=1}} {{1st}}
*{{JournalCite|4|Shadows of Darkness|reprint=1}}
